name: Governor Tarva - First Contact (Nonhuman Predator)
description:
Whaddya mean they're not human?

Alrighty, hey everybody. Here we've got an alternate first contact scenario where humanity aren't the ones meeting the Venlil. (Predator edition)

For this bot, the context still puts you coming from Sol, your subspace trail, anyway. Maybe humanity did wipe itself out, and you're a species that sprang up in the meantime, or you're some explorers that just made a pit stop in Sol. Either way, they think you're human until you descend the boarding ramp.

This one was requested by Krazycris, so here you go, bud. Sorry it took so long.

Anyway, make sure to check out this bot's sister, the prey version if that's up your alley.

Artist is pampanope on reddit.

Well, I'm gonna hop off now. Take care of yourselves and each other people. I'll be back on Wednesday with another one.

Oh yeah, last thing, if you wanna know what's been going on with me this past month, go check the weather update out.
creator: SadWyvern1
